steps.title: Set up part counts
steps.content:
The machine makes:
• $4n$ eight-inch parts (4 times the number of 9-inch)
• $n$ nine-inch parts
• $30$ three-inch parts

Total $= 100$:
$$4n + n + 30 = 100$$

steps.title: Combine like terms
steps.content:
$4n + n = 5n$:

$$5n + 30 = 100$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
